GA21 (1993) minutes, section 21-10, ITEM 4 (BCO 34-1): 'Defeated by the presbyteries' — VOTE: FOR 26 AGAINST [17]. With 26 FOR out of ~43 clearly-voting presbyteries (~60.5%), the amendment fell short of the required two-thirds.

GA22 22-10 ITEM 6 (BCO 32-2/32-3): 'Defeated' — 44 presbyteries FOR. Failed presbytery consent (round 2): 2/3 of the ~67-68 presbyteries (1994) = ~45-46, and ITEM 5 (BCO 24-1) was ADOPTED at exactly 46 FOR while this fell ~1-2 short at 44. Substance re-adopted as BCO 32-3 in 2002.

GA22 (1994) minutes, section 22-10, ITEM 2 (BCO 15-3): 'Failed to receive the 213 consent of presbyteries' — VOTE: FOR 28 AGAINST 21. With 28 FOR out of 49 presbyteries (~57%), the amendment fell short of the required two-thirds.
